name: Le Corbusier

acts.description: Documented fascist sympathies and active collaboration with Vichy regime; sought commissions under occupation
Proposed demolishing central Paris to build his Voisin Plan — ordered concrete towers replacing historic neighborhoods

behavior_summary: The most influential architect of the 20th century had documented fascist sympathies and sought work under the Vichy regime. Also wanted to demolish Paris.

art.summary: Essentially invented modernist architecture. Every glass tower and open-plan apartment in the world is his legacy. The most copied architect in history.

verdict.blurb: He wanted to tear down Paris and replace it with towers. He collaborated with Vichy. He also invented the way most of the world builds. You probably live in a building shaped by ideas he had. The politics and the genius came in the same package and architecture doesn't have a streaming service to boycott.
